harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.depth_bar: The bar is DEPTH >= the cadence — leave enough genuine buildable work to reach the NEXT pass (~30 PRs of capacity) [docs/operations/autonomous-routines.md:199–201]
harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.committed_incident: The old "~9 PRs" horizon drained the queue ~20 PRs before each refill (Q-0164) [docs/operations/autonomous-routines.md:199–201]
harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.step_constant: STEP = 30  # the cadence: a pass per multiple-of-30 PR band (10→20 2026-06-12; 20→30 2026-06-14, Q-0134) [scripts/check_reconciliation_due.py:39]
harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.marker_convention: #N is the **latest merged PR** (the reset target), NOT the pass's own PR number [docs/operations/autonomous-routines.md:246–247]
harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.thin_signal: STILL can't fill the band … that is the SIGNAL, not a failure (Q-0164): set a loud `⚠️ PLAN BACKLOG THIN` line [docs/operations/autonomous-routines.md:209–211]
harvested_quotes_pinned_50481b7.burst_evidence: at burst velocity a 20-band crossed in under a day and fired the docs pass several times daily [scripts/check_reconciliation_due.py:12–14 docstring]

cadence.marker_convention: marker := landing count (the committed reset-to-latest convention)
cadence.window_law: W = 30 - l_prev + l_cur (exact for lag support < 30; F1 re-derives it by direct event-walk of the verbatim trigger arithmetic)

single_band_regime_assertion: all lag support < 30 (the ROUTINE_PAT-lapse full-stall class excluded by construction, named follow-up)

metrics.p_dry: per-cycle dry probability = sum over lag pairs P(pair) * P(Bin(W, q) >= S + 1), exact
metrics.drained_span: E[max(0, W - T_S)], T_S = arrival index of the S-th consuming PR, exact
metrics.dry_span_fraction: E[drained span] / 30 (renewal-reward; E[W] = 30 exactly on every mix, gated)
metrics.dry_consuming_arrivals: E[max(0, Bin(W, q) - S)] per cycle, exact
metrics.safe_depth: S*(q, mix) = min{S : p_dry(S) <= 1/100} by ascending scan

NULL_axes: band-straddle (p_dry in (1/100, 1/20), or S* in {31, 32}, or dry-span fraction in (1/100, 1/50))
forgiveness-theorem failure without gate failure (a constant-lag cell shows p_dry(30) > 0 while F1–F6 pass)
twin-arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

gates.F1: model & mechanism identities: lag pmfs sum to 1; binomial rows sum to 1; window closed form reproduced EXACTLY by a direct event-walk of the verbatim trigger arithmetic over every lag pair; mean-window conservation sum P(pair)*W = 30 exact on all three mixes
gates.F2: forgiveness theorem: p_dry(S = 30) = 0 EXACTLY under every constant lag c at every grid q
gates.F3: q = 1 identity: p_dry(30, q = 1, mix) = P(l_cur > l_prev) exactly on all three mixes
gates.F6: battery: Arm B exact-equal on every published cell; twin independently-written decision evaluators agree on the token; Arm-R draw-count sentinels; aux seed never read; stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs; CPython minor pinned

arm_r.draw_order_pinned: per cycle: ONE uniform inverted through the pinned lag cdf (ascending lag order), then W Bernoulli uniforms in PR order (consume iff u < q, strict); one extra initial lag draw seeds l_prev before cycle 1 (convention C6)
arm_r.no_statistical_gate: a trace drift from the exact value is a named finding, never a ruling; sole gates = draw-count sentinel + byte reproducibility

conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C1: lag pair (l_prev, l_cur) i.i.d. within a mix; P(pair) = product; window W = K - l_prev + l_cur; per-W dedup is a pure computation cache, every pair still carries its own probability
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C2: dry cycle = at least S+1 consuming arrivals inside the W-PR window (binomial tail); drained span = number of PR indices in the window whose start-of-PR queue level is 0, identically max(0, W - T_S); dry consuming-arrivals = consuming arrivals while the level is 0, identically max(0, Bin(W,q) - S)
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C3: Arm A (DECISION, seedless): closed forms — exact binomial tails via math.comb, negative-binomial span sum sum_{t=S..W} (W-t) C(t-1,S-1) q^S (1-q)^(t-S), tail-weighted dry-arrival sum
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C4: Arm B (twin, seedless): independently-written queue-level DP event-walk — states {level 1..S} + ZERO (level 0, never dry-consumed) + DRY (absorbing); per PR: span mass += P(ZERO)+P(DRY), arrivals mass += q*(P(ZERO)+P(DRY)), ZERO --q--> DRY; must reproduce every published Arm-A number EXACTLY
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C5: F1 trigger walk: for every lag pair, marker t0 = 30*B + l_prev at bases B in {1, 33}; increment latest one PR at a time from t0 until the verbatim due rule latest // 30 > marker // 30 fires; landing = crossing + l_cur; walked window landing - t0 must equal 30 - l_prev + l_cur
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C6: Arm R grammar: literal counter/marker/trigger walk at the decision cell; marker seeded by one initial lag draw (marker0 = 930 + l_init); per cycle: crossing found by literal +1 increments and the verbatim due rule, one lag draw -> landing = crossing + lag, W Bernoulli draws walk the queue from level S (order-up-to at landing); draw sentinel: total uniforms == 1 + N + sum W_i per leg
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C7: canonical lowest-terms p/q strings for every exact value; float renderings via repr(float(Fraction)); results.json = json.dump(indent=1, sort_keys=True) + trailing newline, newline='\n'
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C8: safe-depth scan domain S in [0, 60] ascending; S* = first S with p_dry(S) <= 1/100; published brackets are the (S*-1, S*) cells (S*-1 omitted when S* = 0)
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C9: presentation shuffle (seed 20261383) scope: row order of the ONE stdout presentation-shuffled p_dry surface listing only; results.json and all other stdout tables are canonical sorted order

drafter_disclosed_never_gated.dry_consuming_arrivals_wording_note: the block says '≈ 0.751 per dry cycle'; the idea doc says 'per-cycle dry consuming-arrivals ≈ 0.751' — the sim computes both the unconditional per-cycle value and the per-dry-cycle conditional value and reports which one 0.751 is
